# arielsurco-cli shell wrappers — generated, do not edit manually

gp() {
  arielsurco-cli project go "$@"
}
_gp_completions() {
  local currentWord="${COMP_WORDS[COMP_CWORD]}"
  COMPREPLY=($(arielsurco-cli __complete project go "$currentWord" 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^:'))
}
complete -F _gp_completions gp

gpd() {
  eval "$(arielsurco-cli project dev "$@")"
}
_gpd_completions() {
  local currentWord="${COMP_WORDS[COMP_CWORD]}"
  COMPREPLY=($(arielsurco-cli __complete project dev "$currentWord" 2>/dev/null | grep -v '^:'))
}
complete -F _gpd_completions gpd

gpa() {
  arielsurco-cli project add "$@"
}

gpr() {
  arielsurco-cli project remove "$@"
}
